note: Replay fixture matching the Gate 3 WASM replay export shape.
migration_update_note: Added for Gate 3 WASM replay export/import compatibility; expected hashes are produced by the existing Race to N replay support.

expected_private_view_hashes.not_applicable: race_to_n is perfect-information and has no private-view API.

not_applicable.hidden_information: race_to_n is perfect-information and has no hidden state to redact.
not_applicable.stochastic_game_events: race_to_n game rules use no randomness; bot RNG is not replayed from exported documents because resolved commands are recorded.
not_applicable.preview_hashes: race_to_n has no Rust preview surface in Gate 3.
